name: window-management
title: Window Management
description: Raycast-style window layout commands for Vicinae on macOS using Vicinae's internal window bounds RPC.
author: frank

commands.name: left-half
commands.title: Left Half
commands.description: Move the active window to the left half of the current display

commands.name: right-half
commands.title: Right Half
commands.description: Move the active window to the right half of the current display

commands.name: top-half
commands.title: Top Half
commands.description: Move the active window to the top half of the current display

commands.name: bottom-half
commands.title: Bottom Half
commands.description: Move the active window to the bottom half of the current display

commands.name: maximize
commands.title: Maximize
commands.description: Resize the active window to fill the current display

commands.name: almost-maximize
commands.title: Almost Maximize
commands.description: Resize the active window to nearly fill the current display

commands.name: center
commands.title: Center
commands.description: Center the active window on the current display without resizing

commands.name: top-left
commands.title: Top Left Quarter
commands.description: Move the active window to the top-left quarter of the current display

commands.name: top-right
commands.title: Top Right Quarter
commands.description: Move the active window to the top-right quarter of the current display

commands.name: bottom-left
commands.title: Bottom Left Quarter
commands.description: Move the active window to the bottom-left quarter of the current display

commands.name: bottom-right
commands.title: Bottom Right Quarter
commands.description: Move the active window to the bottom-right quarter of the current display

commands.name: first-third
commands.title: First Third
commands.description: Move the active window to the left third of the current display

commands.name: center-third
commands.title: Center Third
commands.description: Move the active window to the center third of the current display

commands.name: last-third
commands.title: Last Third
commands.description: Move the active window to the right third of the current display

commands.name: two-thirds-left
commands.title: Two Thirds Left
commands.description: Move the active window to the left two thirds of the current display

commands.name: two-thirds-right
commands.title: Two Thirds Right
commands.description: Move the active window to the right two thirds of the current display

commands.name: move-to-next-display
commands.title: Move to Next Display
commands.description: Move the active window to the next display while preserving its relative position and size

commands.name: restore-previous-bounds
commands.title: Restore Previous Bounds
commands.description: Restore the active window bounds saved before the last layout command

commands.name: debug-active-window
commands.title: Debug Active Window
commands.description: Copy diagnostic information for the active window and Vicinae window-management runtime

preferences.name: gap
preferences.title: Gap
preferences.description: Pixels to leave between tiled windows and display edges.

preferences.name: paddingTop
preferences.title: Top Padding
preferences.description: Extra pixels to avoid at the top of every display, useful for the macOS menu bar if needed.

preferences.name: paddingBottom
preferences.title: Bottom Padding
preferences.description: Extra pixels to avoid at the bottom of every display, useful for the Dock if needed.

preferences.name: paddingLeft
preferences.title: Left Padding
preferences.description: Extra pixels to avoid at the left edge of every display.

preferences.name: paddingRight
preferences.title: Right Padding
preferences.description: Extra pixels to avoid at the right edge of every display.

preferences.name: activationDelayMs
preferences.title: Activation Delay (ms)
preferences.description: Delay after hiding Vicinae before reading the active window.

preferences.name: almostMaximizePercent
preferences.title: Almost Maximize Percent
preferences.description: Display percentage used by Almost Maximize.
